content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Clover Labs AI: Campaign Manager - SEO & AI Content Anywhere in the World Delaware Search Engine Optimization (SEO), AI Content Creation, Content Writing, Content Creation, and Content Strategy Sales and Marketing Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5808/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Toronto <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://cloverlabs.ai/">https://cloverlabs.ai/</a> </p> <p><strong>Clover</strong> is building fast-moving growth systems for brands using AI-powered content, SEO strategy, and social execution.</p> <p>We’re looking for a Campaign Manager to own day-to-day client campaign execution across SEO-optimized content and TikTok/UGC-style content. This is a hands-on role for someone who understands how content performs, knows how to work with clients, and is excited about using AI tools to move faster without compromising quality.</p> <p>You’ll manage a changing portfolio of client accounts, coordinate content production, keep campaigns moving, communicate clearly with clients, and make sure execution stays aligned with strategy. This role is ideal for someone with 1-2 years of experience in campaign management, client-facing work, content creation, or a fast-moving agency/startup environment.</p> <p><strong>What You’ll Do</strong></p> <ul> <li>Own day-to-day campaign execution for a portfolio of client accounts.</li> <li>Translate client strategy into clear content plans, briefs, timelines, and execution steps.</li> <li>Coordinate SEO-optimized content and TikTok/UGC-style content production.</li> <li>Work closely with content creators and internal team members to keep delivery on track.</li> <li>Communicate with clients through async updates, calls, and follow-ups.</li> <li>Run monthly and/or biweekly client calls with clear agendas and next steps.</li> <li>Track blockers, risks, approvals, delays, and client feedback before they become bigger issues.</li> <li>Maintain clean account documentation in Notion and internal tools.</li> <li>QA content before it goes live to ensure it matches the client’s strategy, tone, and goals.</li> <li>Use AI tools to improve speed, quality, ideation, and campaign execution.</li> <li>Join daily team huddles and stay closely aligned with a fast-moving remote team.</li> </ul> <p><strong>What We’re Looking For</strong></p> <ul> <li>1-2 years of experience in a client-facing, campaign management, customer success, agency, or content-related role.</li> <li>Strong understanding of SEO content and how content should be structured to perform.</li> <li>Experience creating or managing TikTok, UGC, or short-form social content.</li> <li>Experience using AI tools for content creation, ideation, editing, or workflow acceleration.</li> <li>Strong written communication skills, especially for client updates and async communication.</li> <li>High attention to detail and strong organizational habits.</li> <li>Comfortable managing multiple clients, priorities, and moving pieces at once.</li> <li>Able to follow a strategy while spotting when something needs to change.</li> <li>Proactive, fast-moving, and comfortable in a startup environment.</li> <li>Able to work EST hours, regardless of location.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Nice to Have</strong></p> <ul> <li>Agency experience.</li> <li>Experience working with brands across multiple industries.</li> <li>Familiarity with tools like Notion, Slack, ChatGPT/Codex, Claude/Claude Code, Higgsfield, or similar AI/content tools.</li> <li>Experience briefing creators, reviewing content, or managing content calendars.</li> </ul> <p><strong>You’ll Be Successful If</strong></p> <ul> <li>Clients always know what’s happening, what’s next, and what needs their attention.</li> <li>Campaigns move forward without constant reminders or last-minute scrambles.</li> <li>Content is aligned with strategy, brand voice, and performance goals.</li> <li>Internal documentation is clean enough that someone else could quickly understand account status.</li> <li>You catch risks early and communicate them clearly.</li> <li>You use AI thoughtfully to improve execution, not just generate generic content.</li> </ul> <p><strong>How to Apply</strong></p> <p>Send your CV to <code>recruitement@tryredrover.com</code> with the subject line:</p> <p><code>Campaign Manager Application - [Your Name]</code></p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/clover-labs-ai-campaign-manager-seo-ai-content">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/clover-labs-ai-campaign-manager-seo-ai-content</a></p> Thu, 16 Jul
